Now, code:

So putting all together:

class Solution {
public:
    long long maximumTripletValue(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n = nums.size();
        vector<long long> max_i(n, 0);
        long long max_so_far = nums[0];
        for (int j = 1; j < n; ++j) {
            max_i[j] = max_so_far;
            max_so_far = max(max_so_far, (long long)nums[j]);
        }
        vector<long long> prefix_max(n, LLONG_MIN);
        long long current_max_prefix = LLONG_MIN;
        for (int j = 1; j < n; ++j) {
            long long current_diff = max_i[j] - nums[j];
            current_max_prefix = max(current_max_prefix, current_diff);
            prefix_max[j] = current_max_prefix;
        }
        long long result = 0;
        for (int k = 2; k < n; ++k) {
            long long current_candidate = prefix_max[k-1] * nums[k];
            if (current_candidate > result) {
                result = current_candidate;
            }
        }
        return result > 0 ? result : 0;
    }
};

class Solution {
public:
    long long maximumTripletValue(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n = nums.size();
        vector<long long> max_i(n, 0);
        long long max_so_far = nums[0];
        for (int j = 1; j < n; ++j) {
            max_i[j] = max_so_far;
            max_so_far = max(max_so_far, (long long)nums[j]);
        }
        vector<long long> prefix_max(n, LLONG_MIN);
        long long current_max_prefix = LLONG_MIN;
        for (int j = 1; j < n; ++j) {
            long long current_diff = max_i[j] - nums[j];
            current_max_prefix = max(current_max_prefix, current_diff);
            prefix_max[j] = current_max_prefix;
        }
        long long result = 0;
        for (int k = 2; k < n; ++k) {
            long long current_candidate = prefix_max[k-1] * nums[k];
            if (current_candidate > result) {
                result = current_candidate;
            }
        }
        return (result < 0) ? 0 : result;
    }
};

Now, code:

So putting all together:

class Solution {
public:
    long long maximumTripletValue(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n = nums.size();
        vector<long long> max_i(n, 0);
        long long max_so_far = nums[0];
        for (int j = 1; j < n; ++j) {
            max_i[j] = max_so_far;
            max_so_far = max(max_so_far, (long long)nums[j]);
        }
        vector<long long> prefix_max(n, LLONG_MIN);
        long long current_max_prefix = LLONG_MIN;
        for (int j = 1; j < n; ++j) {
            long long current_diff = max_i[j] - nums[j];
            current_max_prefix = max(current_max_prefix, current_diff);
            prefix_max[j] = current_max_prefix;
        }
        long long result = 0;
        for (int k = 2; k < n; ++k) {
            long long current_candidate = prefix_max[k-1] * nums[k];
            if (current_candidate > result) {
                result = current_candidate;
            }
        }
        return result > 0 ? result : 0;
    }
};

But in the code, the initial current_max_prefix is LLONG_MIN. Then for j=1, current_diff is computed, and current_max_prefix is max(LLONG_MIN, current_diff) → which is current_diff. So that's correct.

Implementing the steps.

But in C++, the vector for max_i and prefix_max can be declared as vector<long long>.

But in C++, we need to include that.

So the code:

class Solution {
public:
    long long maximumTripletValue(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n = nums.size();
        vector<long long> max_i(n, 0);
        long long max_so_far = nums[0];
        for (int j = 1; j < n; ++j) {
            max_i[j] = max_so_far;
            max_so_far = max(max_so_far, (long long)nums[j]);
        }
        vector<long long> prefix_max(n, LLONG_MIN);
        long long current_max_prefix = LLONG_MIN;
        for (int j = 1; j < n; ++j) {
            long long current_diff = max_i[j] - nums[j];
            current_max_prefix = max(current_max_prefix, current_diff);
            prefix_max[j] = current_max_prefix;
        }
        long long result = 0;
        for (int k = 2; k < n; ++k) {
            long long current_candidate = prefix_max[k-1] * nums[k];
            if (current_candidate > result) {
                result = current_candidate;
            }
        }
        return (result < 0) ? 0 : result;
    }
};

Wait, but in the code, the prefix_max is initialized as vector<long long>(n, LLONG_MIN). But in the loop, for j from 1 to n-1, we compute current_max_prefix. However, the initial current_max_prefix is LLONG_MIN. Then for j=1, current_diff is computed, and current_max_prefix is max(LLONG_MIN, current_diff) which is current_diff. So that's correct.

But in the code, the prefix_max array is not really needed. We can just track current_max_prefix and not store the entire array. But for code clarity, perhaps it's better to have the array. But how to track that? Because for each k, we need the maximum up to j=k-1. So during the processing of j, we can have a separate array that tracks the maximum up to each j.
